changes_made: Introduced a narrow non-Initial packet-protection material model that stores encryption-level, AEAD, key material, and usage-limit metadata.
Bound the material to the negotiated AEAD rather than the Initial-only algorithm surface.
Threaded packet-protection material updates through the TLS bridge state and runtime seam.
requirements.remaining_gap: The packet-protection material boundary is now explicit, but the Handshake packet-protection helper still needs packet I/O, nonce handling, and TLS handshake plumbing.
requirements.notes: This slice advances the key-derivation boundary without claiming handshake packet protect/open support.

changes_made: Stored the AEAD selected by TLS alongside the packet-protection material boundary.
Verified that the runtime seam accepts and retains TLS-negotiated material for the intended encryption level.
Rejected unsupported AEAD values and malformed usage-limit metadata.
requirements.remaining_gap: The negotiated AEAD is now bound to stored material, but the Handshake packet-protection helper still needs packet I/O, nonce handling, and TLS handshake plumbing.
requirements.notes: This slice binds material to the negotiated AEAD without adding packet protect/open logic.
